name: Rust Flappy Bird Phase 3 - Incremental Retro Visuals

userStories.description: Implement cheerful looping background music with retro/chiptune Game Boy style generated in-code. Integrate with existing audio architecture and mute toggle so M key mutes both SFX and background music. Keep safe fallback if music fails to initialize.
userStories.title: Add looping retro Game Boy style background music

userStories.description: Adjust sprite transform/orientation so the paper plane clearly faces right while still tilting naturally with vertical movement. It must never appear left-facing or mirrored in gameplay.
userStories.title: Refine paper plane to clearly face right

userStories.description: Replace flat pipe rectangles with pixel-art style pipes (cap/body segmentation/shading/highlights) while keeping collision geometry unchanged. Update README features section to include retro BGM and pixel-art pipes. Ensure cargo check and cargo test pass.
userStories.title: Render pipes in pixel-art style and finalize docs
